parties.name: ONG, PETER 2358 MARKET STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Phillip Keith, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gerald K. Down, also present.
Defendant: Peter Ong, present in pro per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Stipulation for entry of Judgment upon breached, stayed as long as Defendant comply to terms.
Defendant shall be in possession of the commercial property located at 2358 Market St., San Francisco, making weekly payment of $807.70 and $115.38 in addition to the weekly payment for 18 months, and additional of $173.24 weekly payment for the next 18 months, for a total of $42,500.00
Mr. Keith to prepare the stipulation and forward to Mr. Ong for signature and to be returned within 2 weeks.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
